testcase.name: test_public_page_exact_slug
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration135.py:54: in test_public_page_exact_slug assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_public_page_uppercase_slug
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration135.py:64: in test_public_page_uppercase_slug assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 for uppercase slug, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 for uppercase slug, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_public_page_mixed_case_slug
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration135.py:74: in test_public_page_mixed_case_slug assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 for mixed case slug, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 for mixed case slug, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
